title: Whispers of the Archive
description: Determine all potions that the target ingredient can certainly produce when mixed with at least one partner.

hints.text: Find all potions that ingredient 4 can certainly produce with at least one partner. A potion is 'certain' when the mix result is the same in every remaining possible world.
Check each of ingredient 4's 7 possible partners. Certain results so far: ing3→B+.
